nps.title: How likely are you to recommend AACsearch?
nps.question: On a scale of 0 to 10, how likely are you to recommend AACsearch to a colleague or friend?
nps.passiveFollowUp: What keeps you from recommending us?
nps.promoterFollowUp: What do you love most about AACsearch?
nps.thanksDescription: Your response helps us build a better search platform for everyone.
